arts.ttl: Real Madrid star not interested in swap move to Premier League for midfield target
arts.sum: Real Madrid decided against moving for a midfielder after the retirement of Toni Kroos, a decision that has been discussed ad nauseam since, with the exception of several weeks before Dani Ceballos was injured. There has been some suggestion that they could look to strengthen the middle of the pitch this summer though. arts.ttl: Inter meet with father of Real Madrid summer target
arts.sum: After several promising showings three seasons ago, talented 20-year-old Nico Paz disappeared from the map for Real Madrid, spending all of last season with Castilla. Since moving to Serie A though, Paz has gone from strength to strength with Como, earning a call-up to the Argentina squad in the process. This season Paz, who moved […] The post Inter meet with father of Real Madrid summer target appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star to be dropped to bench for Atlético clash
arts.sum: A leading member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid is expected to be left out of the club’s latest starting XI. That’s according to Blancos insider…

arts.ttl: Sources: Mbappé plans to start Madrid-Atléti clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid intend to start Kylian Mbappé in Wednesday's Champions League round-of-16 second leg, despite doubts about the forward's fitness.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo: “The Champions League is special for me because I have done well in it”
arts.sum: “We have a special relationship and he's a person who has helped me a lot since the first day he arrived. “The games against Atlético have a different atmosphere because they're derbies, they're the two biggest teams in the city.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Atlético
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Wednesday afternoon unveiled the club’s matchday squad for their upcoming showdown with city rivals Atlético. The latest edition of the Madrid Derby is…

arts.ttl: Man United 'lining up sensational double raid' on Real Madrid to solve two major issues in squad
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly eyeing a double move for Real Madrid duo Aurelien Tchouameni and Andriy Lunin during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Atleti's Correa gets 5-match ban for ref insults
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid forward Ángel Correa has been handed a five-game ban for insulting the referee after being sent off in the club's 2-1 defeat at Getafe on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri on cusp of breaking Kylian Mbappe's Champions League record
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri is looking to break one of Kylian Mbappe's Champions League records when Arsenal face PSV.

arts.ttl: Yellow alert ahead of Atlético-Real Madrid Champions League clash
arts.sum: Antonio Rüdiger, Aurélien Tchouaméni, Eduardo Camavinga, Luka Modric and Endrick will all miss the next round if they are shown a yellow card on Wednesday. They will be boosted by the return of Jude Bellingham, who missed the first Euroderbi due to suspension after picking up his third yellow card of the tournament against Manchester City.
